title: (Pack of 2) Vanilla Scented Candle Jar for Home, Glass Jar Candle Aromatherapy Fragrance with Essential Oils -PAN Aroma- Pattern Wrap Candles (Vanilla Bean)
features: Pack of 2 Vanilla Bean Scented Candle Glass Pot Jar Aromatherapy Fragrance with essential oils-PAN AROMA- Pattern Wrap Candles.

Candles come in printed Jar. treat yourself or buy it as a gift. It comes in its own container which makes the candle convenient and simple to use and stops unwanted wax dripping onto surfaces. Only want to smell the candle when it's burning. The glass container makes it ideal for use indoors or outdoors too.

Vanilla Bean- fill your home with a beautiful lasting scent, and create a cosy, warm and relaxing environment on a cold winter's evening or maybe just a nice pleasant aroma on a summers evening after a hot exhausting day
Each Candle Burn up to 21 Hour - this long-lasting candle will provide your home with a scent throughout the house, depending on how often you light it of course!
